name: Everyone Wants This Recipe Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crisp; drain and crumble.
2. Reserve the bacon drippings. Use them to sauté the onions.
3. Add the mushrooms to the pan and continue sautéing.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine the crumbled bacon, sautéed onions,
sautéed mushrooms, celery salt, cheese, beaten eggs, and milk.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes.
